blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,994 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.1" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
